news.title:
ICICI Prudential AMC's Q4 profit rose 10% to ₹763 crore, driven by higher inflows.
AUM increased 25%, with equity assets leading growth amid market volatility.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential AMC's Q4 profit rose 10% to ₹763 crore, driven by higher inflows.
AUM increased 25%, with equity assets leading growth amid market volatility.

news.title:
ICICI Pru AMC announced Rs 12.4 per share final dividend amid a 16.8% Q4 profit drop to Rs 763 crore.
Despite challenges, ICICI Pru AMC holds 13.2% market share, with 26% YTD stock rise reflecting investor confidence.
news.summary:
ICICI Pru AMC announced Rs 12.4 per share final dividend amid a 16.8% Q4 profit drop to Rs 763 crore.
Despite challenges, ICICI Pru AMC holds 13.2% market share, with 26% YTD stock rise reflecting investor confidence.

news.title: ICICI Prudential AMC declares dividend of ₹12.4 per share.
news.summary: ICICI Prudential AMC declares dividend of ₹12.4 per share.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Asset Management Q4 net profit rises 10.1% YoY to 7.6B.
Q4 revenue increases 19.6% YoY to 15.17B from 12.69B.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Asset Management Q4 net profit rises 10.1% YoY to 7.6B.
Q4 revenue increases 19.6% YoY to 15.17B from 12.69B.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential AMC approved FY26 Q4 results; final dividend of ₹12.4/share.
Company approved a 5-year secretarial auditor and granted new ESOP units.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential AMC approved FY26 Q4 results; final dividend of ₹12.4/share.
Company approved a 5-year secretarial auditor and granted new ESOP units.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential AMC reports Q4 FY26 Mutual Fund QAAUM at 11,047.87 bn.
Operating revenue at 15.2 bn, profit at 11.3 bn; customer base hits 17 mn.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential AMC reports Q4 FY26 Mutual Fund QAAUM at 11,047.87 bn.
Operating revenue at 15.2 bn, profit at 11.3 bn; customer base hits 17 mn.

news.title: ICICI Prudential AMC to announce Q4 results and consider dividend on April 13.
news.summary: ICICI Prudential AMC to announce Q4 results and consider dividend on April 13.

news.title:
March saw mutual fund inflows of Rs 43,600 crore, led by flexi, mid, and small-cap funds, indicating revived retail interest despite market volatility.
ICICI Prudential AMC gained market share to 20.9%, while Nippon AMC and Parag Parikh AMC saw strong traction in small and flexi-cap categories.
news.summary:
March saw mutual fund inflows of Rs 43,600 crore, led by flexi, mid, and small-cap funds, indicating revived retail interest despite market volatility.
ICICI Prudential AMC gained market share to 20.9%, while Nippon AMC and Parag Parikh AMC saw strong traction in small and flexi-cap categories.

news.title:
CLSA rates ICICI Prudential AMC as Outperform with target ₹3,500, citing mutual fund industry's 20% CAGR.
Forecasts include 18% AUM CAGR and 16% PAT CAGR for FY26-28, supported by equity-heavy AUM growth.
news.summary:
CLSA rates ICICI Prudential AMC as Outperform with target ₹3,500, citing mutual fund industry's 20% CAGR.
Forecasts include 18% AUM CAGR and 16% PAT CAGR for FY26-28, supported by equity-heavy AUM growth.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential AMC schedules Q4 FY2026 earnings call on April 13, 2026, from 6:45 PM to 7:45 PM IST.
The company will also hold a media conference call from 6:00 PM to 6:30 PM IST on the same day.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential AMC schedules Q4 FY2026 earnings call on April 13, 2026, from 6:45 PM to 7:45 PM IST.
The company will also hold a media conference call from 6:00 PM to 6:30 PM IST on the same day.

news.title:
Kotak expects better returns from HDFC AMC than ICICI Prudential AMC due to valuation corrections.
HDFC AMC has a 17% upside, while ICICI AMC sees 11%. Both focus on growth in alternatives and strong fund performance.
news.summary:
Kotak expects better returns from HDFC AMC than ICICI Prudential AMC due to valuation corrections.
HDFC AMC has a 17% upside, while ICICI AMC sees 11%. Both focus on growth in alternatives and strong fund performance.

news.title:
March quarter AMC profits may fall sequentially due to MTM losses and softer yields, despite steady inflows.
ICICI Pru and Nippon AMC lead growth, while UTI AMC and Canara Robeco AMC lose market share amid performance gaps.
news.summary:
March quarter AMC profits may fall sequentially due to MTM losses and softer yields, despite steady inflows.
ICICI Pru and Nippon AMC lead growth, while UTI AMC and Canara Robeco AMC lose market share amid performance gaps.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund revises exit load structure for specific schemes from April 6, 2026.
Revised exit load: 1% for redemption/switch within 1 month; NIL beyond 1 month of allotment.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund revises exit load structure for specific schemes from April 6, 2026.
Revised exit load: 1% for redemption/switch within 1 month; NIL beyond 1 month of allotment.

news.title:
Bernstein rates ICICI Prudential AMC 'Outperform' with a Rs 3,500 target, citing strong fund performance, rising flows, and tight commission control.
CIO-led key-man risk and succession concerns are noted but partly offset by internally groomed talent continuity.
news.summary:
Bernstein rates ICICI Prudential AMC 'Outperform' with a Rs 3,500 target, citing strong fund performance, rising flows, and tight commission control.
CIO-led key-man risk and succession concerns are noted but partly offset by internally groomed talent continuity.

news.title:
S Naren of ICICI Prudential AMC advises gradually increasing equity allocation due to favorable valuations and sentiment indicators.
He suggests SIPs/STPs in flexi-cap, value, or business cycle funds and disciplined investing amid market volatility.
news.summary:
S Naren of ICICI Prudential AMC advises gradually increasing equity allocation due to favorable valuations and sentiment indicators.
He suggests SIPs/STPs in flexi-cap, value, or business cycle funds and disciplined investing amid market volatility.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's picks include ICICI Pru AMC, Apollo Hospitals, Bharat Dynamics, Siemens Energy, Jain Resource Recycling, and TBO Tek for growth potential.
Highlights include ICICI Pru AMC's 15% revenue CAGR, Apollo's 22% earnings CAGR, and Bharat Dynamics' strong order book and diversified portfolio.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal's picks include ICICI Pru AMC, Apollo Hospitals, Bharat Dynamics, Siemens Energy, Jain Resource Recycling, and TBO Tek for growth potential.
Highlights include ICICI Pru AMC's 15% revenue CAGR, Apollo's 22% earnings CAGR, and Bharat Dynamics' strong order book and diversified portfolio.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal initiates 'Buy' on ICICI Prudential AMC, sets a ₹3,500 target, 21% upside.
ICICI Prudential AMC's QAAUM grew to ₹9.1T, with 17% CAGR expected FY26-28; EBITDA margins >70%.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal initiates 'Buy' on ICICI Prudential AMC, sets a ₹3,500 target, 21% upside.
ICICI Prudential AMC's QAAUM grew to ₹9.1T, with 17% CAGR expected FY26-28; EBITDA margins >70%.

news.title:
Urban Company, ICICI Prudential AMC among firms with lock-in periods expiring, making shares eligible for trading.
Over 100 crore shares across nine companies, including Fractal Analytics, Aye Finance, and Rubicorn Research, to become tradable.
news.summary:
Urban Company, ICICI Prudential AMC among firms with lock-in periods expiring, making shares eligible for trading.
Over 100 crore shares across nine companies, including Fractal Analytics, Aye Finance, and Rubicorn Research, to become tradable.

news.title:
63% of mutual funds raised cash levels in Feb amid volatility; equity funds held Rs 1.36 lakh crore in cash, up from Rs 1.35 lakh crore.
SBI Mutual Fund led cash increase adding Rs 4,597 crore, while HDFC saw the largest reduction of Rs 8,236 crore in Feb.
news.summary:
63% of mutual funds raised cash levels in Feb amid volatility; equity funds held Rs 1.36 lakh crore in cash, up from Rs 1.35 lakh crore.
SBI Mutual Fund led cash increase adding Rs 4,597 crore, while HDFC saw the largest reduction of Rs 8,236 crore in Feb.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Equity Debt Fund SIP of ₹1,000 since Nov '99 grew to ₹4 Cr, with total investment of ₹31.6 L.
Fund allocates 65-80% to equities, 20-35% to debt, achieving 15.1% CAGR since inception; benchmark delivered lower returns.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Equity Debt Fund SIP of ₹1,000 since Nov '99 grew to ₹4 Cr, with total investment of ₹31.6 L.
Fund allocates 65-80% to equities, 20-35% to debt, achieving 15.1% CAGR since inception; benchmark delivered lower returns.
